subcodes.first_line: O Nabíl! Thy book hath come into the presence of thy Lord in days wherein the city and all around it were seized with turmoil [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا نبیل قد حضر کتابک فی محضر ربک فی ایام فیها اضطربت المدینه و من حولها من
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
